description.value:
**Benefit:** You are able to share a space with a hostile creature at least one size category larger than you. You gain a +2 shield bonus to your AC while occupying an opponentâs space, as well as a +2 bonus on all attack rolls against the creature whose space you share. Creatures you share a square with take a â2 penalty on all concentration checks. Entering a space occupied by an opponent provokes an attack of opportunity. This ability does not stack with similar abilities providing a creature benefits for being in another creatureâs space, such as a mouser swashbucklerâs underfoot attack deed.

**Special:** This feat counts as the Disruptive feat for the purpose of qualifying for other feats that have Disruptive as a prerequisite.
